message:
feat(telemetry): add operational telemetry to bayesian_ledger, trauma_guard, sharding [ft-3kxe.40-42]

Bayesian Ledger (BayesianClassifier): 4 u64 counters tracking updates,
feedbacks, panes_reset, panes_removed. 11 proptest tests.

Trauma Guard (TraumaState): 5 u64 counters tracking commands_recorded,
interventions, mutations_recorded, functional_mutations, history_trims.
Uses #[serde(skip)] since TraumaState derives Serialize. 9 proptest tests.

Sharding (ShardedWeztermClient): 4 AtomicU64 counters tracking spawns,
pane_listings, health_reports, route_lookups. 3 proptest tests (async
methods limit direct counter testing).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -206,6 +206,7 @@ pub struct TraumaState {
     signature_bloom: BloomFilter,
     mutation_epoch: u64,
     last_mutation_timestamp_ms: Option<u64>,
+    #[serde(skip)]
     telemetry: TraumaTelemetry,
 }
